mechanics.text:
EQUIPMENT
Shotguns The shotgun similar t0 rifle , but it has smooth bore and shorter range. Shotguns usually fire   shells containing number of small pellets or flechettes and deliver much greater punch at shorter ranges; Solld Slug Shot: Popular with police for its use in blasting through barriers. shotguns can be loaded with solid slug ammu nition rather than the Usuc pellets  This gives the weapon bet- ter armor penetration but the recoil increases range modifiers the same way as the Sternsnacht (p. 1351. Pump = ction Shotgun: The pump action shotgun draws its ammunition from an internal magazine. The stock and portion of the barre can be removed t0 save kilogram of mass_ at the cost of permanent +1 TN Modifier and halving of all ranges;
Needler Pistol: Lightweight ad cheap_ the needler pistol favored back-up weapon  throughout the Inner Sphere  and Periphery Needler Rlfle: The rifle version of the needler holds larg charge of compressed gas ad has greater range The size makes it unpopular; as more powerful and smaller weapons are readily available.
ENERGY WEAPONS The term energy weapon correctly brings the image Iaser to mind_ Tney inflict damage with raw energy: usually heat; instead of solid   projectile_ Laser weapons popular but expensive. Soldiers prefer the laser because f its light weight and reliability: Most lasers are rugged and have few moving parts significantly reducing the potentia Ior breakdown; When they do malfunction_ however; repairs cannot be accomplished easily in the field, as specialized skills ad tools are required for all but the simplest of jobs_
Gyrojet Weapons Gyrojet guns are recoilless weapons tnat  fire self-Dro- pelled explosive-tipped projectile. They are often favored Ovem standard   slug-throwers pecause of their quiet operation and high damage potential, Ranges are also significantly increased because gyrojet projectiles do not drop off in velocity until tncy reach their maximum effective range_ Gyrojet   weapons are expensive t0 buy and operate limiting their use to wealthy col: lectors and elite special operations teams An identifiable char- acteristic of the weapon is its cone-shaped exhaust plume bright light the projectile exhaust trail can be seen: characters familiar with the weapon need only t0 make Perception Check with +2 Modifier; in addition to all other appropriate modifiers t0 detect the approximate location of the shooter. With the aid of intrared sensing gear; the plume can be seen all lighting conditions and the Perception Check does not suffer the +2 penalty. Gyrojet Pistol: Packing significant punch_ the gyrojet pistol virtual hand cannon; The bulky pistol is difficult t0 conceal; Gyrolet Rlfle: The standard cone rifle is the most common Eyrojet weapon: Though  several different manufacturers  pro duce tnis weapon_ because of the low demand there have been few advances in the design. In fact, they all make virtual copies of  the same Star  League-era rifle, the 5I-445 designed Heston,
Laser Weapons The Iaser is the staple of the technologically superior army; with superior range ad powerful punch. However; lasers are expensive. placing them well out of the price range most prospective users In fact, some estimate that slug-throwers outnumber lasers in the Inner Sphere by more than 20 to (25 in tne Periphery). AlI lasers can be set to fire continuous beam as long as the trigger Is held down, effectively turning the weapon into cutting tool. In this mode_ the weapon expends Its standard power usage rating every seconds during this time can make 1.5 cm-long cut througn cm thick piece of steel. Laser Pistol: The aser pistoi i5 typical sidearm for many pilots and officers militaries throughout the Inner Sphere Laser Rifle: Standard Issue several Varge and well financed militaries laser rifles are popular, though expensive. They are power nogs; virtually requiring soldiers to carry number of additional power packs Blazer Rlfle: Blazers are considered by many to be the ulti: mate hand-held weapon _ despite their kilogram mass_ Essentially two laser rifles packed into one_ Blazers deliver tremendous punch at respectable range using two stacked laser tubes; Unfortunately; they also consume power at an alarming rate The user can fire single barrel only if desired,; treating the weapon as Iaser rifle
Needlers This Is vicious weapon outlawed on many planets It fires spray 0f tiny polymer flechettes; or needles_ instead 0f bul: Needlers are quiet, making them the weapon of choice for many assassins Ammunition consists polymer-composite blocks that the weapon shreds and fires with blast of com pressed gas, making for weapon with Iittle t0 no recoil: The needler has the shortest range of projectile weapon, make impractical for anything but self-defense and close quar ters combai is ideal for combat aboard space-faring vessels: needler' $ armor penetration reduced t0 zero against barri- ers (see 121).
Pulse Laser Weapons significant improvement Ovel standard Iasers pulse lasers Iiterally pulse their beam instead of producing constant one This conserves power and inflicts more damage because targets are struck with multiple blasts Unlike standard laser weapons: pulse lasers can fire bursts. Pulse Laser Pistol: This slightly Iarger and more expen- Sive than regular laser pistol:
